architects: Team CS: Benthem Crouwel Architects + MVSA (Meyer en Van Schooten Architecten) + West 8
note: WebFetch was blocked for most pages. URLs below are constructed from search result data and known Wikimedia/ArchDaily URL patterns. Verify each link before relying on it.

key_features_to_replicate: Pointed V-shaped stainless steel canopy over entrance (the most iconic element)
Glass curtain wall facade below the canopy
Asymmetric roof profile - high vault over tracks, imposing canopy over entrance hall
Interior: wooden slat ceiling (western red cedar) with varying slat widths/heights
250m wide platform roof with transparent glass panels containing solar cell patterns
Reddish stone floor in indoor plaza/concourse
The station letters 'CENTRAAL STATION' on the facade (carried over from original 1957 building)
Clock from original station preserved in new design

approximate_dimensions.total_roof_area: 28,000 sqm (of which 10,000 sqm is glass with solar cells)
approximate_dimensions.note: At Minecraft scale 1:1, this would be enormous. Consider 1:2 or 1:4 scale.

materials_palette.exterior_canopy: Stainless steel cladding (use iron blocks or light gray concrete)
materials_palette.interior_ceiling: Western red cedar wood slats (use stripped jungle/acacia wood)
materials_palette.floor: Reddish stone (use red sandstone or granite)
materials_palette.platform_roof: Steel structure with glass (use iron bars + glass panes)
